---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement for BladeRecon
title: "[Feature]: "
labels:
  - enhancement
assignees: ""
---

# Feature Summary

Provide a short description of the proposed improvement.

---

# Problem Statement

Describe the problem or limitation.

Who is affected?

Why is the current behavior insufficient?

---

# Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution.

Please keep the proposal as specific as possible.

---

# Example Use Case

Describe a real workflow where this improvement would help.

Examples:

- Bug bounty engagement
- Penetration test
- Internal security assessment
- Report generation
- Scan performance
- Resume workflow

---

# Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds.

---

# Expected Benefit

What would improve?

- [ ] Detection Quality
- [ ] Runtime
- [ ] Reliability
- [ ] Reports
- [ ] Resume
- [ ] User Experience
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Packaging
- [ ] Open Source Experience
- [ ] Other

---

# Estimated Impact

How important is this feature?

- [ ] Critical
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low

---

# Scope

Does this proposal require:

- [ ] New recon module
- [ ] New external integration
- [ ] New third-party dependency
- [ ] New scan stage
- [ ] Breaking existing behavior

If yes, explain why it is necessary.

---

# Validation

How could this feature be validated?

Examples:

- Unit tests
- Integration tests
- Real scan
- Sanitized artifacts
- Benchmark comparison

---

# Additional Context

Include:

- Mockups
- Screenshots
- References
- Similar tools
- Research links

---

# Release Checklist

Please confirm:

- [ ] This proposal aligns with BladeRecon's focus on reconnaissance and attack surface discovery.
- [ ] This proposal improves the product without unnecessary complexity.
- [ ] This proposal is not primarily an AI feature request.
- [ ] This proposal can be validated with tests or sanitized scan artifacts.
